task_completion.description: Open NCH Copper Point of Sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NCH Copper Point of Sale application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the description for the payout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Printer Paper Rolls' is entered into an item, description, or note field within the Copper POS interface.
The amount '15.00' (or 15) is entered into a price, amount, or payment field within the Copper POS interface.
Visual confirmation that the transaction has been completed, such as a receipt, a success message, or the transaction appearing in a ledger or transaction list.
A report generation screen or a generated report is visible on screen, documenting the recent transaction.

task_completion.description: Export the report as a PDF to the specified location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or print dialog showing the report being saved as a PDF with the filename 'payout_report.pdf' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' directory, or the saved PDF file visible in the destination folder.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to record the transaction and generate the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Copper POS graphical interface rather than terminal commands or scripts being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported using the application's features
integrity.visual_evidence: The PDF export was performed using the application's built-in reporting or printing features, not by manually typing the report into a word processor or text editor to fake the output.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used is clearly NCH Copper Point of Sale, not a different program or mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected amount: $15.00. Expected description: 'Printer Paper Rolls'. Output file: 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\payout_report.pdf'. App process: 'copper'. CRITICAL NOTE: NCH Copper Point of Sale version 3.06 does not have a native 'Payout' or 'Cash Drop' feature. The agent may attempt a workaround (like a refund, negative sale, or adding an inventory item) or may fail to complete the task entirely. Score based on the visible progress of recording the details and exporting the report. If the agent cannot complete the task due to software limitations, only award points for the steps successfully demonstrated.
